summary: Admin Subscription Filtering Feature - Complete Testing. Both backend API and frontend UI filters are working correctly. All filter combinations (time, plan, duration) successfully filter subscriptions. Active filters summary and Clear Filters functionality verified.

issues: Filter section layout could benefit from better visual separation between filter groups on mobile view

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Filter states properly initialized in useState (timeFilter, planFilter, durationFilter)
✓ buildFilterQuery() correctly builds query string with filter parameters
✓ useEffect triggers fetchData on filter state changes
✓ Backend /api/admin/vip-payments correctly handles time_filter, plan, and duration query params
✓ Backend filters by subscription_plan for plan filter and plan_type for duration filter
✓ Time filter uses approved_at date field for approved status filtering
✓ Active filters summary only shows when filters are non-default values
✓ Clear Filters resets all three filter states to 'all'
✓ Filter buttons have correct color coding: purple (time), blue (plan), emerald (duration)
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Subscription Filtering Testing - Iteration 60:

## Features Tested:

### Backend API Filters (/api/admin/vip-payments):
1. ✓ time_filter parameter: today, week, month (filters by date)
2. ✓ plan parameter: startup, growth, elite (filters by subscription_plan)
3. ✓ duration parameter: monthly, quarterly, half_yearly, yearly (filters by plan_type)
4. ✓ Combined filters work correctly
5. ✓ Filters work for both pending and approved status
6. ✓ /api/admin/subscription-stats returns plan counts

### Frontend Filter UI (/admin/subscriptions):
1. ✓ Time Period: Today, This Week, This Month, All Time buttons
2. ✓ Subscription Plan: All Plans, Startup, Growth, Elite buttons
3. ✓ Duration: All, Monthly, Quarterly, 6 Months, Yearly buttons
4. ✓ Active filter buttons have colored backgrounds (purple, blue, emerald)
5. ✓ Active Filters Summary shows pills for selected filters
6. ✓ Clear Filters button resets all filters
7. ✓ Tabs: Pending and Approved with counts
8. ✓ Filter changes trigger API calls and update displayed data

### Login Flow:
- Two-step login: Email first, then 6-digit PIN
- PIN entry uses 6 individual input boxes
- Auto-submit after all PIN digits entered

### API Endpoints Tested:
- GET /api/admin/vip-payments?status=pending&plan=startup&time_filter=week&duration=monthly
- GET /api/admin/subscription-stats

### Test Files:
- /app/backend/tests/test_admin_subscription_filters.py - 18 tests all passing
